summary: Iteration 15: Verified all 5 reported issues are FIXED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 issues verified working via Playwright.
passed_tests: Issue #1: Mutations page - GET /api/sirh/mutations returns 200 (not 500)
Issue #1: Mutations page loads without 'erreur lors du chargement' error
Issue #2: French accents - 'Données' found with correct accent
Issue #2: French accents - 'Présences' found with correct accent
Issue #3: Dashboard shows 953 Établissements
Issue #3: Dashboard shows 4,114 Enseignants
Issue #3: Dashboard shows 126,804 Élèves
Issue #3: Dashboard shows 3,276 Classes
Issue #3: Dashboard has chart with 26 provinces
Issue #4: Documents > Conversations tab loads correctly
Issue #4: 'Nouvelle Conversation' modal opens with contact search
Issue #4: Contact search shows users (TestPrenom TestNom, Gestion Admin GED, Ressources Humaines Admin SIRH)
Issue #5: Provinces page shows 26 Provinces Administratives
Issue #5: Provinces page shows 60 Provinces Educationnelles
Issue #5: Provinces page shows 567 Sous-Divisions
Issue #5: Map SVG component found with province paths
Issue #5: Map shows P.E. legend (1 P.E., 2 P.E., 3 P.E., 5+ P.E.)
Backend: /api/health returns 200
Backend: /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend: /api/sirh/mutations returns 200 with mutations list
Backend: /api/stats/global returns expected counts (953, 4114, 126804, 3276)
Backend: /api/stats/global has province distribution with 26 provinces
Backend: /api/chat/utilisateurs-contactables returns user list
Backend: Contactable users have searchable fields (nom, prenom, email, telephone)
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 reported issues have been successfully fixed
routes_sirh.py now has get_db() function defined at module level
CarteRDC.jsx correctly uses provincesData prop with provinceAdmin field
PartageDonnees.jsx has correct French accents (Données, Présences, etc.)
Chat contact search working via /api/chat/utilisateurs-contactables endpoint
Map shows P.E. counts from PROVINCES_EDUCATIONNELLES static data
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 user-reported issues are now fixed and verified. The app uses cookie-based auth (httpOnly). API URLs in frontend use relative paths (/api). Dashboard shows 953 establishments, 4114 teachers, 126804 students across 26 provinces. The mutations endpoint was fixed by adding get_db() function to routes_sirh.py. The map component (CarteRDC) uses provincesData prop from PROVINCES_EDUCATIONNELLES static data. Chat contacts load via /api/chat/utilisateurs-contactables.

issue_1_mutations_page.details: GET /api/sirh/mutations returns 200. Page loads without 'erreur lors du chargement' error. Fix: Added get_db() function to routes_sirh.py

issue_2_french_accents.details: Partage de Données page shows correct French accents (Données, Présences, etc.)

issue_3_dashboard_data.details: Dashboard shows 953 establishments, 4,114 teachers, 126,804 students, 3,276 classes with charts

issue_4_chat_contacts.details: Documents > Conversations tab works. Nouvelle Conversation modal shows contacts (TestPrenom TestNom, Gestion Admin GED, etc.)

issue_5_map_provinces.details: Provinces page shows 26 admin provinces, 60 educational provinces, 567 sous-divisions. Map SVG displays with P.E. counts legend
